gamerule.qolmod.tp_countdown.description: How many seconds players must stand still before a teleport fires. 0 = instant.
gamerule.qolmod.homes_max.description: Maximum number of homes a non-operator player can set.
gamerule.qolmod.silk_touch_spawners.desc: Whether spawners can be picked up with a Silk Touch tool, preserving their mob type.
gamerule.qolmod.spawn_immunity_ticks.des: How many ticks of damage immunity players receive when they spawn or respawn. 20 ticks = 1 second. Set to 0 to disable.
gamerule.qolmod.silk_touch_budding_ameth: Whether budding amethyst can be picked up with a Silk Touch tool.
gamerule.qolmod.silk_touch_reinforced_de: Whether reinforced deepslate can be picked up with a Silk Touch tool.
gamerule.qolmod.silk_touch_suspicious_sa: Whether suspicious sand can be picked up (empty) with a Silk Touch tool.
gamerule.qolmod.silk_touch_suspicious_gr: Whether suspicious gravel can be picked up (empty) with a Silk Touch tool.
